_note: Discovery begins before route classification. After brief/evidence are sufficient, set risk_tier from reversibility, blast radius, uncertainty, boundary count, and cost of error. Every skipped gate needs a reason and human approval. Artifact hashes and semantic verdicts are checked before each transition; invalidated artifacts fail closed. Append harness telemetry with scripts/pipeline-event.py.
_grace_full_note: Enable GRACE Full when the selected T3/T4 route requires Phase 2b; do not decide it during startup.
